dynamic.columns: dbh.mean, dbh.max, dbh.min, dbh.p5, dbh.p25, dbh.p75, dbh.p95, height.mean, height.max, height.min, height.p5,height.p95, height.p25,height.p75, stress.mean, stress.max, if(stress>0,1,0).sum, if(stress>0,stress,0).sum, if(dbh>0,1,0).sum, leafarea.sum,woodymass.sum,rootmass.sum,foliagemass.sum
